eligibility.title: Eligibility Check
eligibility.complete_profile_desc: Complete your academic profile to see your eligibility for this program.
eligibility.algorithm_note: Based on our matching algorithm (35% GPA, 25% Language, 30% ECTS, 10% Timing)

watchlist.added_desc: Program has been added to your watchlist.
watchlist.removed_desc: Program has been removed from your watchlist.
watchlist.login_required_desc: Please login to save programs to your watchlist.
watchlist.error: Unable to update watchlist. Please try again.

gaps.title: Gap Analysis
gaps.description: Areas where you can improve your application strength.
gaps.all_requirements_met_desc: You meet all the basic requirements for this program.
gaps.tip_1: Focus on your strongest gap areas first
gaps.tip_3: Connect with our ambassadors for guidance

gpa.title: Academic Performance
gpa.critical_desc: Your GPA is below the minimum requirement. Consider retaking courses or alternative pathways.
gpa.improve_desc: Your GPA meets requirements but could be stronger for competitive programs.

language.title: Language Requirements
language.critical_desc: You need to meet the minimum language requirements for this program.
language.improve_desc: Your language skills are good but improving them will strengthen your application.

ects.title: ECTS Credits
ects.critical_desc: You need significantly more ECTS credits in relevant subjects.
ects.improve_desc: Additional ECTS credits would strengthen your application.

intake.title: Intake Timing
intake.desc: Consider if the intake timing aligns with your plans.

program.uni_assist_desc: This program requires application through uni-assist e.V.

footer.disclaimer: University Assist is not affiliated with uni-assist e.V., DAAD, or German universities. All trademarks belong to their respective owners.
